title: Hub ReactionBody
description: Specifies the details of a reaction to content on Farcaster. A reaction must specify its type (like/recast) and either a target cast ID or URL to react to. Only one target (either castId or URL) should be specified per reaction.

targetCastId.description: The unique identifier of the cast being reacted to. Must be a valid CastId containing the creator's FID and the cast's hash.

targetUrl.title: URL to react to
targetUrl.description: The URL being reacted to. Used when reacting to external content or when the cast ID is not available.
